content: Add GEMINI_API_KEY support to config.py + helper that picks correct key (Gemini key prod / Emergent key dev). Switch GARMENT_VISION_MODEL default Pro → Flash per user.
Update all services that read EMERGENT_LLM_KEY directly → use new helper (gemini_stylist, garment_vision, trend_scout, session_titles, vision_verifier, admin)
Build new gemini_image_service.py using native google-genai SDK for Nano Banana (text→image + image+text→image edit)
Update reconstruction.py: prefer Nano Banana when GEMINI_API_KEY is set, fall back to HF FLUX otherwise
Add GEMINI_API_KEY slot to /app/backend/.env (commented placeholder) + secrets_template.py
Lint backend, restart, verify dev preview still works (regression check)
Document the env-var swap in DEPLOY.md so user knows what to add to VPS .env
Resolve VPS unfinished-merge issue + provide final deploy one-liner
